turns.content: Draft a rulemaking petition resting on CWA 33 U.S.C. 1365 and 40 CFR Part 423; note the currency of each authority.

checks.criterion: Every authority the output relies on carries a currency classification (CURRENT/CHANGED/DEAD/UNVERIFIED); any authority that could not be tool-verified is flagged UNVERIFIED; no authority is presented as good law on the basis of memory alone.
